headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on CenterPoint Energy, Raises Price Target to $48
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $47 to $48.
